paramTokenConvention: Function params are arrays of expression-token arrays, except zero-param functions use params: []. Some export examples include literal strings or booleans directly inside params; validators should warn, not hard-fail, when the surrounding shape is otherwise export-backed.

abs.description: Returns the absolute value of the parameter.
abs.bilingualDescription: 返回参数的绝对值 / Returns the absolute value of the parameter. 如果参数是负数则返回正值，正数或零返回原值 | If the parameter is negative, returns its positive value; if positive or zero, returns the original value.

parameters.name: number/数值
parameters.description: 要计算绝对值的数值，可以是整数或小数 | The number for which to calculate the absolute value, can be integer or decimal

examples.description: 计算-5的绝对值 | Calculate the absolute value of -5

获取距离绝对值 | Get distance absolute value
统计波动幅度 | Statistical fluctuation range
generationNotes: Select this function when the requested business scenario matches the enriched businessScenarios metadata.

arrayAverage.description: Calculate the average value of an array; object arrays may specify a column and optional equality filter.
arrayAverage.bilingualDescription: 计算数组的平均值 | Calculate the average value of an array. 如果数组元素是对象，可通过column参数指定用于计算的属性 | If array elements are objects, use column parameter to specify the property for calculation. 空值不参与计算 | Empty values are excluded from calculation.

parameters.name: list/数组
parameters.description: 数组变量，包含要计算平均值的元素 | Array variable containing elements to calculate average

parameters.name: column/列名
parameters.description: 可选，对象数组中用于计算的属性名 | Optional, property name in object array for calculation

parameters.name: filterColumn/筛选列
parameters.description: 可选，对象数组的筛选列名 | Optional, filter column name in object array

parameters.name: filterValue/筛选值
parameters.description: 可选，仅筛选列属性值等于此值的对象参与计算 | Optional, only objects with filterColumn property equal to this value are included

examples.description: 计算学生成绩的平均分，只计算数学科目 | Calculate average score of students, only for math subject
